description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with five upper residential floors and a ground floor featuring commercial or garage spaces. The facade is primarily beige with orange-brown vertical and horizontal accents, and each residential floor has a row of windows, some paired with small balconies. The ground floor includes large turquoise doors or shutters, likely for retail or parking access, and a recessed entry area. The building's roof is flat and appears weathered, while the side and rear walls are plain and windowless. The front and one side feature multiple balconies with railings, adding depth and visual interest. The overall structure is boxy and functional, typical of urban residential architecture.
description: A five-story beige apartment building with orange accents, balconies, and a ground floor featuring large turquoise doors for commercial or garage use. The facade is detailed with rows of windows and small balconies, while the sides are plain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with windows, balconies, and large turquoise doors at the ground level.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain beige wall with no windows or balconies, highlighting the building's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view with a completely plain beige wall, lacking windows or architectural features.
description_view_3: Side view with windows and balconies, as well as a partial view of the ground floor entrances.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical columns with consistent spacing, aligned symmetrically across each floor, and paired with balconies on the front and one side.
